ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fuel_tax_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sector related to the tax */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tax rate applies */,
  "fuel_tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate per unit for the given sector in the specified year */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., diesel, gasoline, natural gas) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., BTU, gallons, cubic meters) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the tax rate is effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date until which the tax rate is applicable */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tax record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the tax record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_tax_records_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_tax_records_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_tax_records_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Transportation Sector) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector's purpose or focus */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the sector */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact for the sector */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact for the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sectors_parent_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax record that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "previous_rate" REAL /* Previous tax rate before the change */,
  "new_rate" REAL /* New tax rate after the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the change */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the change record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the change record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_changes_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_changes_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES fuel_tax_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax record affected by the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details about the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES fuel_tax_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., historical, projected) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector being analyzed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the analysis */,
  "analysis_data" TEXT /* Data resulting from the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., financial, environmental) */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the analysis */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the analysis */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_analysis_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_analysis_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_analysis_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_year" INTEGER /* Year for the forecast */,
  "predicted_rate" REAL /* Predicted tax rate for the sector in the forecast year */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., linear, exponential) */,
  "forecast_status" TEXT /* Status of the forecast (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the forecast */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the forecast */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_forecasts_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_forecasts_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_forecasts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario simulated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was created */,
  "simulation_data" TEXT /* File path to the simulation results */,
  "simulation_status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed) */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation (e.g., Monte Carlo, deterministic) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the simulation */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was last modified */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the simulation file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_simulations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., regulator, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
